subject: Re: Evaluate Bittensor Field College for 10 out of 10 readiness
body:
Thread reply from tiger-2-0.
Source turn: 019e9600-1585-7ec0-b933-5bd8748b6561

Tiger 2.0 audit completed read-only via public Field College page and API. Scores: Tao Outsider 8.4/10; Bittensor Field College 8.1/10; not honest to call it 10/10 yet. Strengths: 50-module/7-phase structure, real central Bittensor coverage, source discipline, strong Yuma/Weight Copying/AMM/Slippage/Yield/Thesis modules. Blockers: quizzes too easy, repeated module template, missing worked subnet case studies, missing numeric drills for AMM/slippage/yield/APY, Conviction needs latest behavior precision, source desk needs required evidence fields, final exam needs a real subnet thesis artifact. Exact next changes before X promotion: replace at least 40 percent of quiz questions with scenario traps; add 5 public subnet case studies; add numeric exercises; add Subnet Thesis Template; add Field Evidence Checklist; update Conviction for current mainnet behavior; add one explicit APY trap lesson. Verdict: soft-launch as public beta is fair, but 10/10 requires harder assessment, worked examples, numeric drills, and current protocol precision.
